info.name: Bashra AI - AI Dermatology System
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for Bashra AI Dermatology feature.

Covers User AI APIs, Doctor shared AI APIs, Admin AI Usage APIs, secure file access, sharing, doctor review, usage policies, and negative tests.

Import the companion environment file, then set tokens manually.

item.name: 00 - Setup Notes
item.description: Setup and health checks. Real login/auth requests should come from your existing auth collections.

request.description: Root health check used in the AI Dermatology implementation tests.
Alternative health check if mounted under /api.

Do not send. Required environment variables:
- base_url
- user_token
- doctor_token
- admin_token
- super_admin_token
- user_id
- doctor_id
- appointment_id optional
- session_uuid
- completed_session_uuid
- share_uuid
- result_uuid
- file_uuid
- policy_id
- period_key
Creates an active AI dermatology session. Saves data.uuid to session_uuid.
Lists authenticated user's AI sessions.
Gets session, messages, files, results, latest_result, stats, and doctor_review.
Creates final_summary, saves summary_json, and marks session completed.
Gets current monthly usage, active policy, and remaining limits.
Sends symptom text and creates chat_response AI result.

formdata.value: عندي بقعة حمراء في الرقبة مع حكة منذ أسبوع وتزيد مع العرق

request.description: Select an image file manually. Saves uploaded_file.uuid and result.uuid.

item.name: Upload and Analyze Medical PDF/TXT Document

formdata.value: هذا تقرير طبي متعلق بحالة جلدية، أريد تلخيصه وفهم علاقته بالأعراض

request.description: Select PDF or TXT manually. Saves uploaded_file.uuid and result.uuid.
Secure binary file access for session owner. Response may be image/pdf, not JSON.
Shares latest AI result/session with doctor. Saves share_uuid.
Optional: share using appointment_id. Set appointment_id first.
Lists active and revoked shares for the user's session.
Revokes a share. Doctor loses access after revoke.
Doctor lists sessions shared with him. Saves share_uuid and result_uuid if available.

item.name: Doctor - Get Shared AI Session Details

request.description: Doctor views complete shared session details.
Doctor opens shared AI file only if active share exists.
Doctor reviews AI result. Allowed doctor_agreement: agree, partially_agree, disagree.
Admin usage overview: counters, provider logs summary, policy summary.
Admin gets user's AI usage counters, active policies, recent events.
Admin lists policies.

item.name: Admin - Get AI Usage Policy by ID

request.description: Admin gets policy details.

item.name: 06 - Super Admin AI Usage Policy Management
Super Admin - Create User VIP Policy

request.description: Create user policy. Requires super_admin.

item.name: Super Admin - Update AI Usage Policy

request.description: Update policy. Requires super_admin.

item.name: Super Admin - Activate AI Usage Policy

request.description: Activate policy. Requires super_admin.

item.name: Super Admin - Deactivate AI Usage Policy

request.description: Deactivate policy. Requires super_admin.

request.description: Expected 401.

Expected 400.

request.description: Expected 403.

item.name: 08 - SQL Verification Reference
item.description: Manual SQL checks to run in your DB client.

request.description:
Run manually:

SELECT id, policy_name, scope_type, user_id, package_id, max_total_requests_per_month, max_chat_messages_per_month, max_image_analyses_per_month, max_document_analyses_per_month, max_files_per_session, max_tokens_per_request, is_active, priority, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_usage_policies ORDER BY id DESC;

Run manually:

SELECT id, admin_id, action, target_type, target_id, description, severity, created_at FROM admin_logs WHERE target_type = 'AIUsagePolicy' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

Run manually:

SELECT id, uuid, result_type, doctor_reviewed, doctor_agreement, reviewed_by_doctor_id, doctor_notes, reviewed_at FROM ai_analysis_results WHERE uuid = '<result_uuid>';
